---
name: Bug report
about: Something in Resume Job-Fit AI doesn't work as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**To reproduce**
Steps to reproduce (which tab/action: Analyze fit, Generate all, Compare Jobs, Job
Tracker, Company Research, PDF upload, export, etc.):
```
streamlit run app.py
# then...
```

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen instead.

**Environment**
- OS:
- Python version (`python --version`):
- Local run or the live app (resume-job-fit-ai.streamlit.app)?

**Additional context**
Logs, stack traces, or anything else relevant. Redact your `GEMINI_API_KEY` and any
resume/job-description content before pasting.
